title: Review of Magnetic Interference in Welding And Its Impact on Microstructure and Mechanical Performance
authors: M. S. Gonjari, S. M. Bante, R. Adakane, N. G. Jawarkar, D. S. Choudhari, A. S. Chaudhary
abstract: Purpose: The aim of this review is to critically analyse the effect of residual magnetism on welding performance, weld microstructure, and mechanical properties of ferromagnetic materials. The objective of this work is to determine the origin of residual magnetism and its consequences for arc stability, weldability, and material strength. Design/ Methodology/ Approach: A literature search turned up approximately 85 research articles on the subject of the magnetic influence of welding. The paper covers the basic aspects of residual magnetism, arc blow, weld defects, and demagnetisation. The 52 research articles were selected for their relevance and technical quality from the databases Google Scholar, IEEE, Scopus, Web of Science, and ScienceDirect. The keywords used for the literature review were: weld microstructure, arc blow, and demagnetising techniques. Research Limitation: In this article, only published research articles are reviewed, and it lacks direct experimental validation, which may limit the generalisation of the findings. Findings: Comparative analyses prove that magnetically influenced welds have irregular microstructures, inconsistent hardness, lower tensile strength, and increased residual stresses. The review further presents existing and upcoming methods of demagnetisation, including AC and DC field neutralisation, flexible field coils, and in situ demagnetisation, with their strengths and shortcomings outlined. Practical Implication: The welding industry would benefit from this review article by understanding the effects of residual magnetism and adopting suitable magnetisation techniques to improve weld quality. Social Implication: The study supports safer, more reliable welded structures, reducing the risk of failure and maintenance costs in industrial applications. Originality/value: The study revealed a notable absence of standardised demagnetisation processes, highlighting an area where inconsistent or ad hoc practices persist despite their significant implications for weld quality and process reliability.

infographic.key_insight: Residual magnetism can destabilize welding arcs and degrade weld microstructure and mechanical performance in ferromagnetic materials.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Understanding and controlling magnetic interference is important for improving weld quality, strength, reliability, and process consistency in industrial fabrication.
method: Reviewed ~85 published studies and selected 52 high-relevance papers from Google Scholar, IEEE, Scopus, Web of Science, and ScienceDirect.
Synthesized findings on residual magnetism, arc blow, weld defects, demagnetisation, and mitigation techniques.
Compared demagnetisation approaches including AC/DC neutralisation, flexible field coils, and in situ methods.
infographic.evidence_signal: The review reports that magnetically influenced welds commonly show irregular microstructures, inconsistent hardness, lower tensile strength, and higher residual stresses.
infographic.watch_item: Because the paper is a literature review without direct experimental validation, its conclusions depend on the quality and comparability of the cited studies, and standardized demagnetisation practice is still lacking.
infographic.paper_title: Review of Magnetic Interference in Welding And Its Impact on Microstructure and Mechanical Performance

zh-Hans.title: 焊接中的磁干扰及其对显微组织和力学性能影响的综述
zh-Hans.abstract: 目的：本综述旨在批判性分析残余磁性对铁磁材料焊接性能、焊缝显微组织和力学性能的影响。本工作的目标是确定残余磁性的来源及其对电弧稳定性、焊接性和材料强度的后果。设计/方法论/方法：文献检索共找到约85篇关于焊接磁影响主题的研究论文。本文涵盖残余磁性、电弧偏吹、焊接缺陷和退磁的基本方面。从 Google Scholar、IEEE、Scopus、Web of Science 和 ScienceDirect 数据库中选取了52篇具有相关性和技术质量的研究论文。文献综述使用的关键词为：焊缝显微组织、电弧偏吹和退磁技术。研究局限性：本文仅综述已发表的研究论文，缺乏直接实验验证，这可能限制研究结果的普适性。研究结果：比较分析证明，受磁影响的焊缝具有不规则的显微组织、不一致的硬度、较低的抗拉强度以及更高的残余应力。本文进一步介绍了现有及未来的退磁方法，包括交流和直流场中和、柔性磁场线圈以及原位退磁，并概述了它们的优势与不足。实践意义：焊接行业可通过本综述了解残余磁性的影响，并采用合适的磁化技术以提高焊缝质量。社会意义：本研究有助于形成更安全、更可靠的焊接结构，降低工业应用中的失效风险和维护成本。原创性/价值：本研究揭示了标准化退磁流程的明显缺失，指出尽管其对焊缝质量和工艺可靠性具有重要影响，但一致或临时性的做法仍然存在。

infographic.key_insight: 残余磁性会使焊接电弧失稳，并降低铁磁材料的焊缝显微组织和力学性能。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 理解和控制磁干扰对于提高工业制造中的焊缝质量、强度、可靠性和工艺一致性至关重要。
method: 综述了约85篇已发表研究，并从 Google Scholar、IEEE、Scopus、Web of Science 和 ScienceDirect 中选取了52篇高相关性论文。
综合了关于残余磁性、电弧偏吹、焊接缺陷、退磁及缓解技术的研究结果。
比较了包括交流/直流中和、柔性磁场线圈和原位方法在内的退磁方案。
infographic.evidence_signal: 综述报告指出，受磁影响的焊缝通常表现为不规则的显微组织、不一致的硬度、较低的抗拉强度以及更高的残余应力。
infographic.watch_item: 由于本文属于文献综述且没有直接实验验证，其结论依赖于所引研究的质量和可比性，而且标准化退磁实践仍然缺乏。

title: Thermal-Mechanical Analysis of Residual Stress and Deformation in 6082 Aluminum Alloy Welded Joints
authors: Yingqi Cao
abstract: Welding residual stress and deformation have a significant impact on the welded structure and service performance of aluminum alloys. The three-dimensional temperature-displacement coupling of 6082 aluminum alloy butt welding joints was established by using ABAQUS software, and the residual stress distribution and deformation behavior during the welding process were studied. First, transient thermal analysis is conducted to obtain the temperature distribution during the welding process. Then, the obtained temperature field is introduced into mechanical analysis to evaluate the residual stress and structural deformation caused by welding. The results show that the temperature in the weld zone is the highest and gradually decreases towards the base material, with a distinct temperature gradient. During the thermal cycling process of welding, due to uneven thermal expansion and contraction, significant residual stress is concentrated in the weld seam and heat-affected zone. In addition, obvious deformation was observed near the welding area. The established numerical model provides a valuable basis for understanding the thermodynamic behavior of welded aluminum alloy structures and can offer references for the optimization of welding processes and structural design.

infographic.key_insight: A coupled thermal-mechanical ABAQUS model shows that 6082 aluminum butt welds develop peak temperatures in the weld zone, with residual stress and deformation concentrated in the weld seam and heat-affected zone.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The results help predict welding-induced distortion and stress, supporting better process settings and structural design for aluminum alloy welded joints.
method: Built a 3D temperature-displacement coupling model in ABAQUS for 6082 aluminum butt welding.
Performed transient thermal analysis to compute the welding temperature field.
Used the temperature history in a mechanical analysis to estimate residual stress and deformation.
infographic.evidence_signal: The study evaluates simulated temperature distribution, residual stress concentration, and deformation behavior during the welding thermal cycle.
infographic.watch_item: Because the conclusion is based on numerical simulation, accuracy depends on material parameters, boundary conditions, and validation against experiments.
infographic.paper_title: Thermal-Mechanical Analysis of Residual Stress and Deformation in 6082 Aluminum Alloy Welded Joints

zh-Hans.title: 6082铝合金焊接接头残余应力与变形的热-机械分析
zh-Hans.abstract: 焊接残余应力和变形对铝合金焊接结构及服役性能具有显著影响。采用ABAQUS软件建立了6082铝合金对接焊接接头的三维温度-位移耦合模型，并研究了焊接过程中的残余应力分布和变形行为。首先进行瞬态热分析，以获得焊接过程中的温度分布。随后将获得的温度场引入力学分析，用于评估焊接引起的残余应力和结构变形。结果表明，焊缝区域温度最高，并向母材方向逐渐降低，呈现出明显的温度梯度。在焊接热循环过程中，由于热膨胀和收缩不均匀，显著的残余应力集中于焊缝和热影响区。此外，在焊接区域附近观察到明显变形。所建立的数值模型为理解焊接铝合金结构的热力学行为提供了有价值的基础，并可为焊接工艺优化和结构设计提供参考。

infographic.key_insight: ABAQUS热-机械耦合模型表明，6082铝合金对接焊接在焊缝区域产生峰值温度，残余应力和变形集中于焊缝及热影响区。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这些结果有助于预测焊接引起的变形和应力，从而支持铝合金焊接接头更优的工艺参数设置和结构设计。
method: 在ABAQUS中为6082铝合金对接焊接建立三维温度-位移耦合模型。
进行瞬态热分析以计算焊接温度场。
将温度历史用于力学分析，以估算残余应力和变形。
infographic.evidence_signal: 该研究评估了焊接热循环过程中的模拟温度分布、残余应力集中和变形行为。
infographic.watch_item: 由于结论基于数值模拟，其准确性取决于材料参数、边界条件以及与实验结果的验证。

title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior
authors: Sneha Samal, Shrikant Joshi, Stefan Björklund, Mohit Chandra, Akhil Bhardwaj, Jaromír Kopeček
abstract: Depositing various coatings on surface of engineering components with the aim to improve their performance concerning wear, corrosion, friction and thermal protection is already a standard practice. Depositing metallic NiTi shape memory alloy coatings may be a viable alternative for hard ceramic coatings. NiTi coatings offer additional benefits originating from unique functional thermomechanical properties. However, fabrication of thick NiTi coatings turned out to be difficult. Standard electroplating and laser cladding methods are not suitable for NiTi the most widely used plasma spray methods tend to produce chemically inhomogeneous coatings that do not transform martensitically, cold sprayed NiTi coatings suffer from poor adhesion to the substrates. In this work we report on first ever successful fabrication of thick NiTi coatings (100-300 um) that display functional thermomechanical properties and simultaneously show very good adherence to the substrate. We used high velocity air fuel thermal spray method to fabricate NiTi coatings deposited on mild steel using four different sets of processing parameters. Chemical composition, porosity, microstructure, phase transformation and functional thermomechanical properties of the NiTi coatings were evaluated. Although the coatings contain inhomogeneous microstructure, voids, oxide particles, high density of dislocation defects and internal stress, they undergo martensitic transformation upon cooling and or mechanical loading. As sprayed NiTi coatings need to be annealed to display functional thermomechanical properties. Despite their limited tensile strength, the coatings displayed thermal actuation in 3 point bending tests and shape memory effects in nanoindentation and scratch tests.

infographic.key_insight: High-velocity air fuel (HVAF) spraying can produce thick NiTi coatings that retain martensitic transformation and functional shape-memory behavior after annealing.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This offers a practical path to add wear-resistant, thermally active NiTi functional coatings to steel components where conventional spray or cladding routes have struggled.
method: HVAF-sprayed NiTi onto mild steel using four processing parameter sets
Characterized chemistry, porosity, microstructure, and phase transformation behavior
Tested functional response using 3-point bending, nanoindentation, and scratch loading
infographic.evidence_signal: The coatings were evaluated with microstructural and thermomechanical measurements and showed martensitic transformation plus thermal actuation and shape-memory effects after annealing.
infographic.watch_item: As-sprayed coatings contain inhomogeneous microstructure, oxides, voids, and high defect/stress levels, so post-spray annealing and adhesion/strength validation are important before deployment.
infographic.paper_title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior

zh-Hans.title: HVAF喷涂NiTi涂层：显微组织、相变与形状记忆行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 在工程构件表面沉积各种涂层以提升其在磨损、腐蚀、摩擦和热防护方面的性能，已是一种标准做法。沉积金属NiTi形状记忆合金涂层可作为硬质陶瓷涂层的一种可行替代方案。NiTi涂层还具有源于其独特功能热机械性能的附加优势。然而，制备厚NiTi涂层一直较为困难。标准的电镀和激光熔覆方法并不适用于NiTi；最常用的等离子喷涂方法往往会产生化学成分不均匀、且不会发生马氏体相变的涂层；冷喷NiTi涂层则存在与基体附着力差的问题。在这项工作中，我们报道了首次成功制备出具有功能热机械性能、同时与基体具有良好附着性的厚NiTi涂层（100-300 um）。我们采用高速空气燃料热喷涂方法，在低碳钢基体上使用四组不同工艺参数制备NiTi涂层。对NiTi涂层的化学成分、孔隙率、显微组织、相变及功能热机械性能进行了评估。尽管涂层包含不均匀显微组织、孔洞、氧化物颗粒、高密度位错缺陷和内应力，但其在冷却和/或机械载荷作用下仍会发生马氏体相变。喷涂态NiTi涂层需要进行退火处理，才能表现出功能热机械性能。尽管其拉伸强度有限，这些涂层在三点弯曲测试中表现出热致驱动效应，并在纳米压痕和划痕测试中表现出形状记忆效应。

infographic.key_insight: 高速空气燃料（HVAF）喷涂能够制备出厚NiTi涂层；经退火后，这些涂层仍能保持马氏体相变和功能形状记忆行为。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为在钢制构件上添加耐磨、热致活化的NiTi功能涂层提供了一条实用途径，适用于传统喷涂或熔覆工艺难以实现的场景。
method: 采用四组工艺参数，通过HVAF在低碳钢上喷涂NiTi
对化学成分、孔隙率、显微组织和相变行为进行表征
通过三点弯曲、纳米压痕和划痕载荷测试功能响应
infographic.evidence_signal: 通过显微组织和热机械测量对涂层进行评估，结果显示退火后涂层发生了马氏体相变，并表现出热致驱动和形状记忆效应。
infographic.watch_item: 喷涂态涂层含有不均匀显微组织、氧化物、孔洞以及较高的缺陷/应力水平，因此在实际应用前，后喷涂退火以及附着力/强度验证很重要。

title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks
authors: Sen Li, Xiaoying Liu, Xiaojian Xu, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Ling Lan
abstract: The laser welding full-penetration is of critical importance, as it constitutes one of the fundamental factors in achieving defect-free welded joints. Accurate prediction of the penetration state is therefore essential for ensuring weld quality. To this end, this paper introduces SimPhysNet, a novel algorithm that achieves high classification accuracy in laser welding penetration prediction using only a limited number of labelled images. This approach effectively overcomes the limitations of supervised learning classification algorithms, which are hindered in industrial applications by their dependence on extensive, high-quality labelled data. The core of SimPhysNet is a unique self-supervised learning paradigm that embeds physical priors into a contrastive learning framework. By incorporating a physics-informed neural network (PINN), the model is guided to extract physically meaningful features of the molten pool and keyhole from a large set of unlabelled data, while three image augmentation tasks further enhance its generalization capabilities. Subsequently, a few-shot learning strategy, based on prototypical networks, enables robust classification by constructing class representations from a minimal set of labelled images. Experimental results demonstrate that SimPhysNet achieves a classification accuracy of 96.06% using only 200 labelled images (approximately 5% of the total labelled dataset), which is comparable to the performance of conventional supervised learning algorithms that utilize the entire labelled dataset. This work presents a new, efficient, and highly accurate method, providing the way for the intelligent automation of laser welding.

infographic.key_insight: SimPhysNet combines physics-informed self-supervised learning with few-shot prototypical classification to predict laser welding penetration accurately using very few labeled images.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables practical, data-efficient weld quality monitoring for industrial laser welding where labeled defect/penetration data are scarce and expensive to annotate.
method: Physics-informed neural network (PINN) extracts physically meaningful molten-pool/keyhole features from unlabeled images.
Three image augmentation tasks improve representation learning and generalization.
Prototypical network uses a small labeled set to classify penetration state with few-shot learning.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports 96.06% classification accuracy using only 200 labeled images, about 5% of the labeled dataset, comparable to fully supervised baselines.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on the quality and representativeness of the unlabeled process images and the specific welding setup, so transfer to new materials or machines may need recalibration.
infographic.paper_title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks

zh-Hans.title: 一种基于物理信息神经网络的自监督学习激光焊接过程焊缝熔深预测模型
zh-Hans.abstract: 激光焊接全熔透至关重要，因为它是实现无缺陷焊接接头的基本因素之一。因此，准确预测熔深状态对于确保焊缝质量至关重要。为此，本文提出 SimPhysNet，这是一种新颖的算法，仅使用少量标注图像即可在激光焊接熔深预测中实现较高的分类精度。该方法有效克服了监督学习分类算法的局限性；这类算法在工业应用中受限于对大量高质量标注数据的依赖。SimPhysNet 的核心是一种独特的自监督学习范式，它将物理先验嵌入对比学习框架中。通过引入物理信息神经网络（PINN），模型被引导从大量未标注数据中提取熔池和小孔的物理有意义特征，同时三种图像增强任务进一步提升了其泛化能力。随后，基于原型网络的少样本学习策略通过从极少量标注图像构建类别表征，实现了稳健分类。实验结果表明，SimPhysNet 仅使用 200 张标注图像（约占全部标注数据集的 5%）即可达到 96.06% 的分类准确率，这与使用全部标注数据集的传统监督学习算法性能相当。该工作提出了一种新的、高效且高精度的方法，为激光焊接的智能自动化提供了路径。

infographic.key_insight: SimPhysNet 将物理信息自监督学习与少样本原型分类相结合，仅用很少的标注图像即可准确预测激光焊接熔深。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这使得工业激光焊接中可行的数据高效型焊接质量监测成为可能，因为标注缺陷/熔深数据稀缺且标注成本高。
method: 物理信息神经网络（PINN）从未标注图像中提取具有物理意义的熔池/小孔特征。
三种图像增强任务提升表征学习和泛化能力。
原型网络利用少量标注集通过少样本学习对熔深状态进行分类。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告仅使用 200 张标注图像（约占标注数据集的 5%）即可获得 96.06% 的分类准确率，与全监督基线相当。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能取决于未标注过程图像的质量和代表性以及具体焊接装置，因此迁移到新材料或新设备时可能需要重新校准。

title: Computational and machine learning modelling approaches for weld quality predictions in friction stir welding of high-density polyethylene
authors: A. Alhourani, I. Barsoum, J. Sheikh-Ahmad, S. Deveci
abstract: Friction stir welding (FSW) has gained recognition as an effective technique for joining thermoplastic materials. This study presents a comprehensive investigation to predict FSW characteristics such as weld temperatures, vertical axial forces, material flow and defect formation in FSW of high-density polyethylene (HDPE) using both computational and machine learning approaches, validated by experimental results. A three-dimensional Coupled Eulerian-Lagrangian (CEL) numerical model is developed to simulate the HDPE welding process under varying process parameters of rotational and welding speeds, and bottom preheating conditions. The CEL numerical model is validated against experimental data, showing markedly good agreement in predicting void formation, thermal and mechanical responses. Results indicate that preheating the bottom surface proved effective in reducing thermal gradients and stabilizing vertical force fluctuations. Quantitatively, bottom-surface preheating at 60 °C reduced peak plunge force from 1600 N close to 1100 N and raised peak temperatures from 70 °C (without preheat) to about 100 °C, hence smoothing through-thickness gradients and stabilizing the axial force distribution. In parallel, two multilayer perceptron artificial neural networks (ANNs) are trained on experimental data to predict temporal temperature and axial force responses with R2 between 0.91 and 0.99, demonstrating high accuracy and strong generalization across the tested FSW parameter space. The computational CEL simulations accurately predicted weld zone morphology, including stir zone, thermo-mechanically affected zone and heat-affected zone, however the combined CEL–ANN framework enables rapid generation of process maps that highlights defective and defect-free welding windows, with optimal conditions obtained at 1500 rpm and 30 mm/min with 60 °C preheating, and poor weldability observed at 1000 rpm without preheating due to wormhole formation. These findings provide process-driven design guidelines for developing robust HDPE joints and demonstrate how integrating computational modeling with machine learning enables efficient optimization, offering valuable insights into the key characteristics of the FSW process in thermoplastics and supporting its broader adoption in industrial applications.

infographic.key_insight: A coupled CEL simulation plus ANN surrogate can accurately predict and optimize friction stir welding quality in HDPE, especially when bottom preheating is used to stabilize heat flow and axial force.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The results provide actionable process windows for producing stronger, defect-reduced thermoplastic welds with lower trial-and-error in manufacturing.
method: 3D Coupled Eulerian-Lagrangian (CEL) model for thermal, force, flow, and defect prediction
Two multilayer perceptron ANNs trained on experimental temperature and axial-force histories
Process mapping across rotational speed, welding speed, and bottom preheating conditions
infographic.evidence_signal: The ANN models achieved R2 values of 0.91 to 0.99, and the CEL model matched experiments well for void formation, thermal response, and mechanical response.
infographic.watch_item: The process map is based on the tested HDPE parameter space, so deployment on other geometries, thicknesses, or thermoplastics will likely require retraining and revalidation.
infographic.paper_title: Computational and machine learning modelling approaches for weld quality predictions in friction stir welding of high-density polyethylene

zh-Hans.title: 用于高密度聚乙烯搅拌摩擦焊焊接质量预测的计算与机器学习建模方法
zh-Hans.abstract: 搅拌摩擦焊（FSW）作为一种连接热塑性材料的有效技术，已获得广泛认可。本研究采用计算方法和机器学习方法，并结合实验结果验证，对高密度聚乙烯（HDPE）搅拌摩擦焊中的焊缝温度、竖直轴向力、材料流动和缺陷形成等FSW特征进行综合研究。建立了三维耦合欧拉-拉格朗日（CEL）数值模型，用于模拟在不同转速、焊接速度以及底部预热条件下HDPE焊接过程。CEL数值模型与实验数据进行了验证，在预测孔隙形成、热响应和力学响应方面表现出明显良好的一致性。结果表明，对底表面进行预热可有效降低热梯度并稳定竖直力波动。定量而言，底表面在60 °C预热时，峰值压入力由接近1600 N降至约1100 N，峰值温度由70 °C（无预热）升至约100 °C，从而平滑了厚度方向梯度并稳定了轴向力分布。与此同时，基于实验数据训练了两个多层感知机人工神经网络（ANNs），用于预测时间温度和轴向力响应，R2介于0.91和0.99之间，表明其在所测试的FSW参数空间内具有较高精度和较强泛化能力。计算CEL模拟能够准确预测焊缝区形貌，包括搅拌区、热机械影响区和热影响区；此外，CEL–ANN联合框架能够快速生成工艺图谱，标示有缺陷和无缺陷的焊接窗口，其中在1500 rpm和30 mm/min并采用60 °C预热时获得最佳条件，而在无预热且1000 rpm时由于虫洞形成而表现出较差的可焊性。这些发现为开发稳健的HDPE接头提供了基于工艺的设计指南，并表明将计算建模与机器学习相结合能够实现高效优化，为理解热塑性材料FSW过程的关键特征提供了有价值的见解，并支持其在工业应用中的更广泛采用。

infographic.key_insight: 耦合CEL模拟与ANN代理模型可准确预测并优化HDPE搅拌摩擦焊质量，尤其是在采用底部预热以稳定热流和轴向力时。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这些结果为制造更强、缺陷更少的热塑性焊接接头提供了可操作的工艺窗口，并减少制造中的试错。
method: 用于热、力、流动和缺陷预测的三维耦合欧拉-拉格朗日（CEL）模型
两个基于实验温度和轴向力历程训练的多层感知机ANN
跨转速、焊接速度和底部预热条件的工艺映射
infographic.evidence_signal: ANN模型的R2值达到0.91至0.99，CEL模型在孔隙形成、热响应和力学响应方面与实验吻合良好。
infographic.watch_item: 该工艺图谱基于所测试的HDPE参数空间，因此将其部署到其他几何形状、厚度或热塑性材料上，可能需要重新训练和重新验证。

title: When mathematics remains trade-blind: recontextualization and workplace mobilization in Ghanaian welding and fabrication education
authors: Philip Adjei Acheampong, Francis Kwadwo Awuah, Farouq Sessah Mensah
abstract: Mathematics is essential to vocational competence, yet its occupational relevance may remain obscured when taught as generic academic content. This study examines a specific form of mathematics-vocational misalignment in Ghanaian Welding and Fabrication education: the gap between the formal inclusion of mathematics in the curriculum and its functional integration into trade-specific practice . Using an interpretive qualitative case-study design, the study draws on semi-structured interviews with 12 participants across two technical institutes and 10 workplace observation sessions involving two recent graduates. Data were analyzed through reflexive thematic analysis informed by abductive reasoning. The findings show that mathematics was embedded in fabrication activities, including measuring, cutting, spacing, estimating, forming angles, and constructing artifacts. However, respondents described the implemented curriculum as a shared TVET mathematics syllabus that was commonly taught and assessed as general, examination-oriented mathematics rather than as trade-specific occupational reasoning. Vocational instructors, therefore , frequently reconstructed the occupational meaning of mathematics during workshop activities, a process the study conceptualizes as retrospective repair. Workplace observations further revealed uneven mathematical mobilization: graduates acknowledged that mathematics was involved in all 48 recorded activities, but varied in their ability to identify and articulate the concepts used. The study contributes by distinguishing formal inclusion from functional integration, conceptualizing workshop mediation as retrospective repair, and proposing trade-blind mathematics instruction as a sensitizing concept for examining weak recontextualization in vocational mathematics education.

infographic.key_insight: The paper shows that mathematics in Ghanaian welding and fabrication education is formally present but often taught as generic school math rather than as trade-specific reasoning, forcing instructors to recontextualize it during workshop practice.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For welding and fabrication training, the study highlights that measurement, spacing, cutting, angles, and estimation are core mathematical tasks that should be taught as occupational skills to improve competence and workplace transfer.
method: Interpretive qualitative case study in two technical institutes
Semi-structured interviews with 12 participants
10 workplace observation sessions with two recent graduates
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports reflexive thematic analysis of interview and observation data, with graduates identifying mathematics in all 48 recorded workplace activities but differing in how well they could name the concepts used.
infographic.watch_item: The findings are context-specific and based on a small sample, so the proposed recontextualization approach may need adaptation before wider curriculum implementation.
infographic.paper_title: When mathematics remains trade-blind: recontextualization and workplace mobilization in Ghanaian welding and fabrication education

zh-Hans.title: 当数学仍然与行业脱节：加纳焊接与制造教育中的再情境化与工作场所动员
zh-Hans.abstract: 数学对于职业胜任力至关重要，但当它作为通用学术内容来教授时，其职业相关性可能仍然不明显。本研究考察了加纳焊接与制造教育中一种特定的数学—职业错位：数学在课程中被正式纳入，却未能与具体工种实践实现功能性整合。研究采用解释性定性案例研究设计，基于对两个技术学院12名参与者的半结构式访谈，以及与两名近届毕业生相关的10次工作场所观察。数据通过受溯因推理启发的反思性主题分析进行处理。研究结果表明，数学嵌入于制造活动之中，包括测量、切割、间距确定、估算、形成角度以及构建工件。然而，受访者将所实施的课程描述为一套共享的TVET数学教学大纲，这套大纲通常被作为通用的、面向考试的数学来教授和评估，而不是作为与工种相关的职业推理来处理。因此，职业教师经常在车间活动中重新建构数学的职业意义，本研究将这一过程概念化为追溯性修复。工作场所观察进一步揭示了数学动员程度的不均衡：毕业生承认数学参与了全部48项记录在案的活动，但他们在识别和表述所使用概念的能力上存在差异。本研究通过区分正式纳入与功能性整合，概念化车间调解为追溯性修复，并提出“对工种不敏感的数学教学”作为一个启发性概念，以考察职业数学教育中薄弱的再情境化。

infographic.key_insight: 本文表明，加纳焊接与制造教育中的数学在形式上存在，但往往被作为通用学校数学来教授，而不是作为与工种相关的推理来教授，因此教师必须在车间实践中对其进行再情境化。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于焊接与制造培训而言，本研究强调测量、间距、切割、角度和估算是核心数学任务，应作为职业技能来教授，以提升胜任力和工作场所迁移能力。
method: 两个技术学院中的解释性定性案例研究
对12名参与者进行半结构式访谈
对两名近届毕业生进行10次工作场所观察
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了对访谈和观察数据的反思性主题分析；毕业生在全部48项记录在案的工作场所活动中都识别出了数学，但在命名所用概念的能力上存在差异。
infographic.watch_item: 这些发现具有情境特异性，且基于较小样本，因此所提出的再情境化方法在更广泛的课程实施之前可能需要调整。

title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: In laser penetration welding, the assessment of penetration state and weld seam morphology plays a crucial role in determining the weld quality. This paper presents a comprehensive introduction of the innovative muti-task deep learning model that has the capability to predict penetration state, depth, and weld seam morphology with high accuracy. The monitoring platform relies on weld pool images captured during the laser welding process using a complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor camera. The proposed model integrates spatiotemporal features extracted from top weld pool images along with welding parameters, establishing a deep learning framework based on convolutional neural networks and state space models for more efficient extraction and processing of spatial-temporal information. Furthermore, a reliable method for constructing the dataset is proposed to enhance both robustness and generalization capability of the developed model. Validation results on the test set demonstrate that prediction accuracy for penetration state can reach 99.35%, while prediction error for penetration depth is 1.79 millimeter, and accuracy of reconstructing the weld cross-section is 95.65%. This study provides new insights and methodologies for in-situ quality control strategies in laser penetration welding systems.

infographic.key_insight: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network can use top-view weld pool images plus welding parameters to predict penetration state, depth, and weld seam morphology in real time.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The method supports in-situ quality control for laser penetration welding by enabling earlier detection of defective penetration and improved process monitoring.
method: Capture weld pool images with a CMOS camera during welding.
Fuse spatial-temporal features from image sequences with welding parameters using CNNs and state-space models.
Train a multi-task model to jointly predict penetration state, depth, and cross-section morphology.
infographic.evidence_signal: On the test set, the model achieved 99.35% penetration-state accuracy, 1.79 mm penetration-depth error, and 95.65% weld cross-section reconstruction accuracy.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on the quality and diversity of the constructed dataset, so generalization to new welding setups or materials should be validated.
infographic.paper_title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding

zh-Hans.title: 用于预测激光焊接中熔深和形貌的多任务时空深度神经网络
zh-Hans.abstract: 在激光穿透焊接中，对熔深状态和焊缝形貌的评估在判定焊接质量方面起着关键作用。本文系统介绍了一种创新的多任务深度学习模型，该模型能够高精度预测熔深状态、熔深以及焊缝形貌。监测平台依赖于在激光焊接过程中使用互补金属氧化物半导体（CMOS）相机采集的熔池图像。所提出的模型将从顶部熔池图像以及焊接参数中提取的时空特征进行融合，构建了一个基于卷积神经网络和状态空间模型的深度学习框架，以更高效地提取和处理时空信息。此外，本文提出了一种可靠的数据集构建方法，以增强所开发模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。测试集上的验证结果表明，熔深状态预测准确率可达99.35%，熔深预测误差为1.79毫米，焊缝截面重建准确率为95.65%。本研究为激光穿透焊接系统中的原位质量控制策略提供了新的见解和方法。

infographic.key_insight: 多任务时空深度神经网络可以利用俯视熔池图像及焊接参数，实时预测熔深状态、熔深和焊缝形貌。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该方法通过实现对未熔透等缺陷的更早检测和改进过程监测，支持激光穿透焊接的原位质量控制。
method: 在焊接过程中使用 CMOS 相机采集熔池图像。
利用 CNN 和状态空间模型融合图像序列中的时空特征与焊接参数。
训练多任务模型以联合预测熔深状态、熔深和截面形貌。
infographic.evidence_signal: 在测试集上，该模型实现了99.35%的熔深状态准确率、1.79毫米的熔深误差以及95.65%的焊缝截面重建准确率。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能依赖于所构建数据集的质量和多样性，因此需要验证其在新的焊接装置或材料上的泛化能力。

title: Enhanced Seam Segmentation for Automated Welding Robot in Construction Through Transfer Learning: Addressing Limitations of Bilateral Segmentation Network
authors: Keonvin Park, Yong Ann Voeurn, Hyeokjun Kweon, Doyun Lee
abstract: Reliable seam segmentation is essential for autonomous robotic welding in construction, where harsh illumination, specular reflections, and thin weld geometries often degrade segmentation performance. This study proposes a reflection-robust seam segmentation framework that enhances a BiSeNetV2 backbone through transfer learning and a hybrid Cross-Entropy--Lovász loss. Rather than increasing architectural complexity, the proposed framework improves reflection robustness through learning-stability-oriented optimization. Experimental results show that the proposed method achieves 81.76\% Joint IoU and 90.73\% mIoU, improving Joint IoU by +22.36 percentage points over the OHEM-based baseline while maintaining identical FLOPs, parameter count, and inference speed. The proposed approach also recovers 96.33\% of severe zero-IoU failure cases under reflective conditions. Comparative experiments across BiSeNetV2, DeepLabV3+, UNet, and SegFormer further demonstrate that the proposed optimization strategy is particularly effective for lightweight real-time segmentation architectures. Qualitative analyses additionally show improved seam continuity and reflection robustness in challenging welding environments. These findings suggest that the proposed framework provides a practical and lightweight perception solution for robotic welding applications involving reflective metallic surfaces.

infographic.key_insight: A lightweight transfer-learning upgrade to BiSeNetV2 makes seam segmentation far more robust to harsh reflections in robotic welding, without increasing model size or speed cost.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This offers a practical real-time perception module for construction welding robots that need reliable seam detection on reflective metal surfaces.
method: Fine-tuned BiSeNetV2 with transfer learning for seam segmentation
Used a hybrid Cross-Entropy + Lovász loss to improve boundary and overlap learning
Kept the architecture lightweight to preserve FLOPs, parameters, and inference speed
infographic.evidence_signal: The proposed method reached 81.76% Joint IoU and 90.73% mIoU, improving Joint IoU by 22.36 points over the OHEM baseline and recovering 96.33% of severe zero-IoU failures under reflective conditions.
infographic.watch_item: Performance gains are demonstrated on the reported welding datasets and conditions, so robustness should still be validated for new site-specific lighting, joint types, and camera setups.
infographic.paper_title: Enhanced Seam Segmentation for Automated Welding Robot in Construction Through Transfer Learning: Addressing Limitations of Bilateral Segmentation Network

zh-Hans.title: 通过迁移学习增强建筑自动焊接机器人焊缝分割：针对双边分割网络局限性的改进
zh-Hans.abstract: 在建筑环境中的自主机器人焊接中，可靠的焊缝分割至关重要；而恶劣光照、镜面反射和细长焊缝几何形态往往会降低分割性能。本研究提出一种抗反射焊缝分割框架，通过迁移学习和混合 Cross-Entropy--Lovász 损失增强 BiSeNetV2 主干网络。所提出的框架并未增加架构复杂度，而是通过面向学习稳定性的优化来提升抗反射能力。实验结果表明，所提出的方法达到了 81.76% 的 Joint IoU 和 90.73% 的 mIoU；在保持相同 FLOPs、参数量和推理速度的同时，相较于基于 OHEM 的基线，Joint IoU 提升了 +22.36 个百分点。该方法还在反射条件下恢复了 96.33% 的严重零 IoU 失败案例。针对 BiSeNetV2、DeepLabV3+、UNet 和 SegFormer 的对比实验进一步表明，所提出的优化策略对轻量级实时分割架构尤其有效。定性分析还显示，在具有挑战性的焊接环境中，焊缝连续性和抗反射能力均有所提升。这些结果表明，所提出的框架为涉及反射金属表面的机器人焊接应用提供了一种实用且轻量级的感知解决方案。

infographic.key_insight: 对 BiSeNetV2 进行轻量级迁移学习升级，可在不增加模型大小或速度开销的情况下，使机器人焊接中的焊缝分割对恶劣反射的鲁棒性大幅提升。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为建筑焊接机器人提供了一个实用的实时感知模块，可在反射性金属表面上实现可靠的焊缝检测。
method: 使用迁移学习微调 BiSeNetV2 进行焊缝分割
采用混合 Cross-Entropy + Lovász 损失以改善边界与重叠学习
保持架构轻量化，以保留 FLOPs、参数量和推理速度
infographic.evidence_signal: 所提出的方法达到 81.76% 的 Joint IoU 和 90.73% 的 mIoU；相较于 OHEM 基线，Joint IoU 提升了 22.36 个百分点，并在反射条件下恢复了 96.33% 的严重零 IoU 失败案例。
infographic.watch_item: 性能提升是在所报告的焊接数据集和条件下得到验证的，因此对于新的现场特定光照、接头类型和相机设置，仍应进一步验证其鲁棒性。

title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: Supervised deep learning has been widely used for weld penetration state classification; however, its performance often degrades significantly under domain shift, such as when transferring models between welding processes with distinct physical mechanisms:for instance, from arc-dominated tungsten inert gas (TIG) welding to keyhole-based laser welding. To overcome this limitation, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) framework integrated with a gradual source domain expansion (GSDE) strategy. Evaluated on dedicated TIG and laser welding datasets, our approach achieves high accuracy in both same-process and cross-process transfer tasks. Specifically, it attains average accuracies of 90.65% on TIGFH and 90.72% on LSPS in same-process settings, surpassing a supervised baseline by 35.83% and 38.87%, respectively. More notably, in cross-process scenarios, it reaches 80.48% for TIG to Laser and 81.13% for Laser to TIG, improving upon the baseline by 43.39% and 43.40%. UMAP visualizations verify that the model learns domain-invariant features while maintaining discriminative class boundaries. This method considerably lowers the relabeling cost for new welding processes and enhances the versatility of intelligent monitoring across different welding systems.

infographic.key_insight: An unsupervised domain adaptation framework with gradual source domain expansion can transfer weld penetration prediction across fundamentally different welding processes without requiring new target labels.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables more robust, lower-cost intelligent monitoring when deploying weld quality models from one process or machine setup to another, reducing relabeling effort for new welding lines.
method: Train a UDA model to align source and target feature distributions
Use gradual source domain expansion to improve transfer stability
Predict weld penetration status for same-process and cross-process welding data
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports average accuracies of 90.65% on TIGFH and 90.72% on LSPS in same-process tests, and 80.48% TIG-to-Laser plus 81.13% Laser-to-TIG in cross-process transfer, all far above the supervised baseline.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may still depend on the similarity of welding conditions and the quality of domain alignment, so real deployment should validate across additional materials, parameters, and sensor setups.
infographic.paper_title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding

zh-Hans.title: 基于激光和TIG焊接中无监督域适应的跨工艺焊接熔深状态预测算法
zh-Hans.abstract: 监督式深度学习已被广泛用于焊缝熔深状态分类；然而，当模型在具有不同物理机理的焊接工艺之间迁移时，其性能往往会因域偏移而显著下降：例如，从以电弧为主的钨极惰性气体（TIG）焊迁移到基于小孔效应的激光焊。为克服这一局限，我们提出了一种结合渐进式源域扩展（GSDE）策略的无监督域适应（UDA）框架。在专用的TIG和激光焊接数据集上评估后，我们的方法在同工艺和跨工艺迁移任务中均取得了较高准确率。具体而言，在同工艺设置下，其在TIGFH和LSPS上的平均准确率分别达到90.65%和90.72%，较监督基线分别提升35.83%和38.87%。更值得注意的是，在跨工艺场景中，TIG到Laser的准确率达到80.48%，Laser到TIG的准确率达到81.13%，分别较基线提升43.39%和43.40%。UMAP可视化验证了该模型在保持判别性类别边界的同时学习到了域不变特征。该方法显著降低了新焊接工艺的重新标注成本，并增强了智能监测在不同焊接系统中的通用性。

infographic.key_insight: 采用渐进式源域扩展的无监督域适应框架，可以在不需要新的目标域标签的情况下，在本质上不同的焊接工艺之间迁移焊缝熔深预测。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这使得将焊接质量模型从一种工艺或设备配置部署到另一种工艺或设备配置时，更加稳健且成本更低，可减少新焊接产线的重新标注工作量。
method: 训练UDA模型以对齐源域和目标域特征分布
使用渐进式源域扩展提高迁移稳定性
预测同工艺和跨工艺焊接数据的焊缝熔深状态
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告显示，在同工艺测试中，TIGFH上的平均准确率为90.65%，LSPS上的平均准确率为90.72%；在跨工艺迁移中，TIG到Laser为80.48%，Laser到TIG为81.13%，均远高于监督基线。
infographic.watch_item: 性能仍可能取决于焊接条件的相似性和域对齐质量，因此在实际部署中应在更多材料、参数和传感器配置上进行验证。

title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach
authors: Selwyn Jebadurai Devaraj, A. Arul Jeya Kumar, A Queen Alice, V Manoj Kumar, S Arokya Agustin, A Sarath Chandra
abstract: Ti-6Al-4V alloy is used a lot in aerospace, biomedical and marine applications. This study investigates the tribological behaviour of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coated and uncoated Ti-6Al-4V alloy by experimental and machine learning approaches. An Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 ceramic coating, approximately 200 µm thick, was applied to Ti-6Al-4V alloy via the detonation gun (D-gun) process under regulated conditions (oxygen flow: 4800 SLPH, acetylene: 2150 SLPH, stand-off distance: 180 mm, particle velocity ∼1200 m/s). The wear behaviour of samples was tested using a pin-on-disc apparatus in accordance with ASTM G99 standards. Tests were conducted under normal loads of 40–100 N, sliding speeds of 100–200 rpm and durations of 20–40 min against an EN31 steel counter face. Scanning electron microscopy demonstrated that coated surfaces exhibited reduced wear and formed a protective tribo-layer. Machine learning models such as artificial neural networks, K-nearest neighbours and random forest were developed to predict wear based on sliding parameters. Random forest proved to be the best choice with less mean percentage error and mean squared error. The results showed that D-gun deposited Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coatings improved the wear performance of Ti-6Al-4V.
venue: Proceedings of the Institution of Mechanical Engineers Part E Journal of Process Mechanical Engineering

infographic.key_insight: A D-gun applied Al2O3-TiO2 ceramic coating significantly improves the wear resistance of Ti-6Al-4V, and random forest best predicts wear from test conditions.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This suggests detonation-sprayed ceramic coatings can extend the tribological life of titanium alloy components in aerospace, biomedical, and marine service.
method: Applied ~200 µm Al2O3-TiO2 coating to Ti-6Al-4V using detonation gun spraying.
Ran ASTM G99 pin-on-disc wear tests at 40–100 N, 100–200 rpm, and 20–40 min against EN31 steel.
Built ANN, KNN, and random forest models to predict wear from sliding parameters.
infographic.evidence_signal: SEM showed reduced wear and formation of a protective tribo-layer on coated surfaces, and random forest gave the lowest mean percentage and mean squared error among the tested models.
infographic.watch_item: The reported ML performance is based on a limited experimental parameter range, so broader validation is needed before using the model for wider operating conditions.
infographic.paper_title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach

zh-Hans.title: Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun 涂层 Ti-6Al-4V 合金的摩擦学性能增强：一种机器学习方法
zh-Hans.abstract: Ti-6Al-4V 合金广泛用于航空航天、生物医学和海洋应用。本研究采用实验和机器学习方法，考察了 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 涂层与未涂层 Ti-6Al-4V 合金的摩擦学行为。采用受控条件下的爆炸喷涂枪（detonation gun，D-gun）工艺，将约 200 µm 厚的 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 陶瓷涂层施加于 Ti-6Al-4V 合金上（氧气流量：4800 SLPH，乙炔：2150 SLPH，喷涂距离：180 mm，颗粒速度约 1200 m/s）。按照 ASTM G99 标准，使用销盘式试验装置测试样品的磨损行为。试验在 40–100 N 的法向载荷、100–200 rpm 的滑动速度以及 20–40 min 的试验时间下，针对 EN31 钢对偶面进行。扫描电子显微镜结果表明，涂层表面磨损降低，并形成了保护性摩擦膜。建立了人工神经网络、K 近邻和随机森林等机器学习模型，用于根据滑动参数预测磨损。随机森林以更低的平均百分比误差和均方误差表现最佳。结果表明，D-gun 沉积的 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 涂层提高了 Ti-6Al-4V 的耐磨性能。

infographic.key_insight: D-gun 制备的 Al2O3-TiO2 陶瓷涂层显著提高了 Ti-6Al-4V 的耐磨性，且随机森林对试验条件下的磨损预测效果最佳。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这表明爆炸喷涂陶瓷涂层可延长航空航天、生物医学和海洋服役中钛合金部件的摩擦学寿命。
method: 采用爆炸喷涂枪（detonation gun spraying）在 Ti-6Al-4V 上制备约 200 µm 的 Al2O3-TiO2 涂层。
按照 ASTM G99，在 40–100 N、100–200 rpm 和 20–40 min 条件下，使用 EN31 钢对偶面进行销盘式磨损试验。
构建 ANN、KNN 和随机森林模型，根据滑动参数预测磨损。
infographic.evidence_signal: SEM 显示涂层表面磨损减轻并形成了保护性摩擦膜，且在所测试模型中，随机森林的平均百分比误差和均方误差最低。
infographic.watch_item: 报告的机器学习性能基于有限的实验参数范围，因此在更宽的工况条件下应用该模型之前，还需要更广泛的验证。

title: Hot Corrosion Behavior of Thermal Sprayed Using HVAF and DS Techniques with Tribaloy-400 Coatings for Solar Energy Storage Container
authors: P. Sakthivel, G. Sivakumar, M. Manikandan
abstract: The present study investigates the high-temperature corrosion behaviour of Tribaloy-400 (T-400) coatings deposited on ASTM A516 steel using two thermal spray techniques: (i) High Velocity Air Fuel (HVAF) spraying and (ii) Detonation Spraying (DS). The coated specimens were exposed to a molten solar salt environment consisting of 60% NaNO 3 –40% KNO 3 at 500 °C for exposure durations up to 1000 hours to evaluate their oxidation and corrosion resistance. Phase analysis indicated the formation of stable protective oxide phases, including Cr 2 O 3 , Co 3 O 4 , and CoMoO 4 , in both coating systems. Elemental mapping revealed that the HVAF coating retained a uniform Cr–Mo–Si–O enriched surface with minimal molten salt penetration even after prolonged exposure of 1000 hours. In contrast, the DS coating exhibited comparatively deeper salt ingress into the coating microstructure, which contributed to increased degradation and spallation. SEM observations showed that the HVAF coatings possessed a dense and well-bonded microstructure, along with the formation of thermodynamically stable oxides such as Cr 2 O 3 , CoCr 2 O 4 , and CoMoO 4 , resulting in superior resistance to molten salt-induced corrosion. However, the relatively porous nature of the DS coating promoted salt-assisted oxide dissolution, leading to higher mass gain, increased spallation, and accelerated degradation during extended exposure. Comparative evaluation of both coating techniques was carried out to identify a suitable coating process and feedstock combination for high-temperature CSP applications.
venue: Journal of Materials Research and Technology

infographic.key_insight: HVAF-sprayed Tribaloy-400 formed a denser, more protective oxide scale than detonation-sprayed coating, giving better resistance to molten-salt hot corrosion at 500 °C.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For concentrated solar power thermal-storage containers, HVAF T-400 coatings appear more suitable than DS for long-duration exposure to nitrate salt environments.
method: Tribaloy-400 was deposited on ASTM A516 steel by HVAF and detonation spraying.
Coated samples were exposed to 60% NaNO3–40% KNO3 molten salt at 500 °C for up to 1000 h.
Phase, SEM, elemental mapping, and mass-change/spallation observations were used to compare corrosion performance.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports stable oxide formation and minimal salt penetration in HVAF coatings, while DS showed deeper ingress, higher mass gain, and more spallation after long exposure.
infographic.watch_item: Results are based on a specific nitrate-salt composition and test temperature, so performance may differ under other CSP salts, thermal cycling, or service conditions.
infographic.paper_title: Hot Corrosion Behavior of Thermal Sprayed Using HVAF and DS Techniques with Tribaloy-400 Coatings for Solar Energy Storage Container

zh-Hans.title: 采用HVAF和DS技术在Tribaloy-400涂层太阳能储能容器上的热腐蚀行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究考察了采用两种热喷涂技术——(i) 高速空气燃料（HVAF）喷涂和 (ii) 爆炸喷涂（DS）——沉积在 ASTM A516 钢上的 Tribaloy-400（T-400）涂层的高温腐蚀行为。将涂覆试样暴露于由 60% NaNO3–40% KNO3 组成的熔融太阳盐环境中，在 500 °C 下暴露最长达 1000 小时，以评估其抗氧化和耐腐蚀性能。相分析表明，两种涂层体系中均形成了稳定的保护性氧化物相，包括 Cr2O3、Co3O4 和 CoMoO4。元素映射显示，即使在暴露 1000 小时后，HVAF 涂层仍保持均匀的富 Cr–Mo–Si–O 表面，且熔融盐渗透极少。相比之下，DS 涂层表现出更深的盐向涂层微观结构内部侵入，这导致了更严重的劣化和剥落。SEM 观察表明，HVAF 涂层具有致密且结合良好的微观结构，并形成了 Cr2O3、CoCr2O4 和 CoMoO4 等热力学稳定氧化物，从而对熔融盐诱导腐蚀表现出更优异的抵抗能力。然而，DS 涂层相对多孔的特性促进了盐辅助的氧化物溶解，导致质量增加更大、剥落更严重，并在长时间暴露过程中加速劣化。对两种涂层技术进行了比较评估，以确定适用于高温 CSP 应用的合适涂层工艺与供料组合。

infographic.key_insight: HVAF 喷涂的 Tribaloy-400 形成了比爆炸喷涂涂层更致密、保护性更强的氧化膜，因此在 500 °C 下对熔融盐热腐蚀具有更好的抵抗能力。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于聚光太阳能发电（CSP）热储能容器，HVAF T-400 涂层似乎比 DS 更适合在硝酸盐环境中进行长时间服役。
method: 采用 HVAF 和爆炸喷涂将 Tribaloy-400 沉积在 ASTM A516 钢上。
将涂覆试样在 500 °C 下暴露于 60% NaNO3–40% KNO3 熔融盐中，最长达 1000 h。
通过相分析、SEM、元素映射以及质量变化/剥落观察来比较腐蚀性能。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告称，HVAF 涂层形成了稳定的氧化物且盐渗透极少，而 DS 在长时间暴露后表现出更深的侵入、更高的质量增加和更严重的剥落。
infographic.watch_item: 结果基于特定的硝酸盐盐组成和测试温度，因此在其他 CSP 熔盐、热循环或服役条件下性能可能不同。

title: Physics-Guided Spatiotemporal State Space Modeling for Lookahead Molten Pool Segmentation in Laser Wire-Feed Welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Changhao Yin, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: Real-time weld-pool perception is critical for closed-loop control in laser wire-feed welding, where sensing, computation, and actuator response introduce unavoidable delay. This paper presents a physics-guided spatiotemporal state space network for lookahead weld-pool segmentation. The model uses historical coaxial grayscale images, welding process parameters, and aligned wire-state electrical signals to predict the future semantic layout of three physically meaningful regions: keyhole, wire, and molten pool. It combines a visual encoder, process- and sensor-conditioned feature normalization, patch-level temporal state space modeling, horizon-conditioned latent prediction, dense future feature prediction, and a motion-aware mask decoder. Auxiliary signed-distance-function supervision, temporal consistency, feature distillation, and fine-grained keyhole losses further constrain the predicted geometry and local motion. Experiments on a 43-sequence laser welding dataset show that the proposed WeldMamba reaches 74.63\% mIoU at a 500 ms lookahead. Ablation studies further show that temporal history, patch-level state space modeling, and keyhole motion awareness are the main contributors to robust future segmentation.

infographic.key_insight: WeldMamba predicts future molten-pool, wire, and keyhole geometry from past images plus process/sensor signals, enabling lookahead weld-pool segmentation for delayed closed-loop control.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This gives laser wire-feed welding controllers an earlier view of pool evolution, which can improve timing, trajectory correction, and defect avoidance under sensing and actuation delay.
method: Uses historical coaxial grayscale frames with welding parameters and wire-state electrical signals as multimodal inputs.
Applies physics-guided feature normalization, patch-level temporal state space modeling, and horizon-conditioned latent prediction to forecast future segmentation.
Adds motion-aware decoding with auxiliary SDF, temporal consistency, and keyhole-focused losses to preserve geometry and local dynamics.
infographic.evidence_signal: On a 43-sequence laser welding dataset, the method achieved 74.63% mIoU at a 500 ms lookahead, with ablations showing history, patch-level state space modeling, and keyhole motion awareness are most important.
infographic.watch_item: Performance depends on well-aligned multimodal sensing and may be sensitive to process changes or sensor noise outside the training distribution.
infographic.paper_title: Physics-Guided Spatiotemporal State Space Modeling for Lookahead Molten Pool Segmentation in Laser Wire-Feed Welding

zh-Hans.title: 用于激光送丝焊接前瞻熔池分割的物理引导时空状态空间建模
zh-Hans.abstract: 在激光送丝焊接中，实时焊池感知对于闭环控制至关重要，因为传感、计算与执行器响应会引入不可避免的延迟。本文提出一种用于前瞻焊池分割的物理引导时空状态空间网络。该模型利用历史同轴灰度图像、焊接工艺参数以及对齐的丝材状态电信号，预测三个具有物理意义区域的未来语义布局：钥孔、丝材和熔池。该方法结合了视觉编码器、受工艺和传感器条件约束的特征归一化、补丁级时间状态空间建模、由预测时域条件化的潜变量预测、稠密未来特征预测以及具运动感知的掩码解码器。辅助的符号距离函数监督、时间一致性、特征蒸馏以及细粒度钥孔损失进一步约束了预测几何形状和局部运动。在一个包含43个序列的激光焊接数据集上的实验表明，所提出的WeldMamba在500 ms前瞻下达到74.63% mIoU。消融研究进一步表明，时间历史、补丁级状态空间建模和钥孔运动感知是实现鲁棒未来分割的主要贡献因素。

infographic.key_insight: WeldMamba利用过去图像以及工艺/传感信号预测未来的熔池、丝材和钥孔几何形状，从而实现面向延迟闭环控制的前瞻焊池分割。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为激光送丝焊接控制器提供了更早的焊池演化视图，有助于在传感与执行延迟条件下改进时序、轨迹修正和缺陷规避。
method: 将历史同轴灰度帧与焊接参数和丝材状态电信号作为多模态输入。
采用物理引导的特征归一化、补丁级时间状态空间建模和由预测时域条件化的潜变量预测来预测未来分割。
加入具运动感知的解码，并结合辅助SDF、时间一致性和面向钥孔的损失，以保持几何形状和局部动态。
infographic.evidence_signal: 在一个包含43个序列的激光焊接数据集上，该方法在500 ms前瞻下达到74.63%的mIoU，消融结果表明历史信息、补丁级状态空间建模和钥孔运动感知最为重要。
infographic.watch_item: 性能依赖于对齐良好的多模态传感，在训练分布之外可能对工艺变化或传感器噪声较为敏感。

title: Effect of Ceramic Thermal Barrier Coatings on a Diesel Engine Fueled with Jatropha Biodiesel Ternary Emulsion Blends
authors: Nagesh Babu Vemula, Farooq Shaik, Gopinath Dhamodaran, Radha Krishna Gopidesi
abstract: This work examines the performance, combustion, and emission characteristics of a diesel engine coated with a ceramic thermal barrier coating and fueled with emulsified Jatropha biodiesel blended with water and butanol. A low heat rejection (LHR) engine was prepared by depositing a 100 µm NiCrAlY bond coat and a 200 µm of 8YSZ ceramic top coat via air plasma spraying. B20W10Bu5, B20W10Bu10, and B20W10Bu15 ternary emulsions were successfully produced using ultrasonic homogenization. The experimental outcomes indicate that the ceramic-coated engine exhibited higher thermal efficiency than that of the conventional engine. The highest performance was achieved with B20W10Bu10 fuel, which resulted in a 7.4% increase in the brake thermal efficiency and a 7.8% decrease in the brake-specific fuel consumption relative to the results for the conventional coated diesel engine. Hydrocarbons, carbon monoxide, and smoke emissions decreased considerably due to the combined impacts of oxygenated fuel composition, micro-explosions, and thermal insulation capability. It can be seen from the discussion above that the utilization of a ceramic thermal barrier coating and the Jatropha-based ternary emulsion fuel, especially B20W10Bu10, shows great promise for enhancing engine performance while lowering exhaust emissions.

infographic.key_insight: A ceramic thermal barrier coating combined with a Jatropha biodiesel-water-butanol emulsion, especially B20W10Bu10, improved diesel engine efficiency while reducing major exhaust emissions.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study shows that low-heat-rejection engine coatings can work synergistically with oxygenated alternative fuels to boost performance and cut pollution in compression-ignition engines.
method: Applied a 100 µm NiCrAlY bond coat and 200 µm 8YSZ top coat by air plasma spraying.
Prepared ternary emulsions (B20W10Bu5, B20W10Bu10, B20W10Bu15) using ultrasonic homogenization.
Tested coated vs. conventional diesel engine performance, combustion, and emissions.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports that B20W10Bu10 increased brake thermal efficiency by 7.4% and reduced brake-specific fuel consumption by 7.8% relative to the conventional coated diesel engine, with lower HC, CO, and smoke emissions.
infographic.watch_item: Emulsion stability, long-term coating durability, and real-engine operability need validation before practical deployment.
infographic.paper_title: Effect of Ceramic Thermal Barrier Coatings on a Diesel Engine Fueled with Jatropha Biodiesel Ternary Emulsion Blends

zh-Hans.title: 陶瓷热障涂层对以麻疯树生物柴油三元乳化混合燃料驱动柴油机性能的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究考察了在柴油机上施加陶瓷热障涂层，并使用与水和丁醇混合的乳化麻疯树生物柴油作为燃料时，其性能、燃烧和排放特性。通过空气等离子喷涂制备低热损失（LHR）发动机：先沉积100 µm的NiCrAlY粘结层，再沉积200 µm的8YSZ陶瓷面层。采用超声均质化成功制备了B20W10Bu5、B20W10Bu10和B20W10Bu15三元乳液。实验结果表明，陶瓷涂层发动机的热效率高于常规发动机。以B20W10Bu10燃料获得了最佳性能，相较于常规涂层柴油机的结果，其制动热效率提高了7.4%，制动比油耗降低了7.8%。由于含氧燃料组成、微爆炸以及热绝缘能力的共同作用，碳氢化合物、一氧化碳和烟度排放显著降低。由上述讨论可见，陶瓷热障涂层与基于麻疯树的三元乳液燃料，尤其是B20W10Bu10，在提升发动机性能并降低排气排放方面具有很大应用前景。

infographic.key_insight: 陶瓷热障涂层结合麻疯树生物柴油-水-丁醇乳液，尤其是B20W10Bu10，可提高柴油机效率并降低主要排气排放。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究表明，低热损失发动机涂层可与含氧替代燃料协同作用，从而提升压燃式发动机性能并减少污染。
method: 通过空气等离子喷涂施加100 µm NiCrAlY粘结层和200 µm 8YSZ面层。
使用超声均质化制备三元乳液（B20W10Bu5、B20W10Bu10、B20W10Bu15）。
测试涂层柴油机与常规柴油机的性能、燃烧和排放。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告称，与常规涂层柴油机相比，B20W10Bu10使制动热效率提高了7.4%，制动比油耗降低了7.8%，同时HC、CO和烟度排放更低。
infographic.watch_item: 在实际应用前，还需要验证乳液稳定性、涂层长期耐久性以及真实发动机工况下的可运行性。

title: Research on the Application of “BOPPPS + Xuexitong” Blended Teaching in Mechanical Courses of Higher Vocational Colleges: Taking Fundamentals of Mechanical Design as an Example
authors: Lin Xu, Xiaojie Li, Junjie Huang
abstract: Aiming at the problems existing in the teaching of the higher vocational course Fundamentals of Mechanical Design, such as low student participation, insufficient learning interest, and abstract teaching content, this study constructs a “BOPPPS + Xuexitong” blended teaching model. This model deeply integrates the six links of the BOPPPS teaching model (Bridge-in, Objective, Pre-assessment, Participatory learning, Post-assessment, Summary) with the functions of the Xuexitong platform, runs through the three stages of pre-class, during-class, and after-class, and realizes the organic connection between online and offline teaching. Taking “Composition and Classification of Hinge Four-bar Mechanisms” as an example, this paper elaborates on the teaching design process and implementation based on this model in detail. Teaching practice shows that the “BOPPPS + Xuexitong” blended teaching model effectively stimulates students’ learning interest, improves classroom participation, promotes students’ understanding and mastery of abstract knowledge, and enhances teaching quality. This study provides a referable practical path for the teaching reform of engineering courses in higher vocational colleges.

infographic.key_insight: A "BOPPPS + Xuexitong" blended teaching model can make abstract mechanical-design content more engaging and understandable for higher vocational students.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study demonstrates a practical course-design framework for improving learning outcomes in foundational mechanical engineering education through online-offline integration.
method: Combine BOPPPS stages with Xuexitong platform functions across pre-class, in-class, and after-class phases.
Use bridge-in, objectives, pre-assessment, participatory learning, post-assessment, and summary to structure teaching.
Apply the model to "Composition and Classification of Hinge Four-bar Mechanisms" as a case lesson.
infographic.evidence_signal: Teaching practice reported increased student interest, stronger classroom participation, and better understanding of abstract knowledge, indicating improved teaching quality.
infographic.watch_item: The abstract does not provide quantitative comparison data, so the effectiveness claim appears to be based on practice observation rather than detailed measured metrics.
infographic.paper_title: Research on the Application of “BOPPPS + Xuexitong” Blended Teaching in Mechanical Courses of Higher Vocational Colleges: Taking Fundamentals of Mechanical Design as an Example

zh-Hans.title: “BOPPPS + 学习通”混合式教学在高职机械类课程中的应用研究——以《机械设计基础》为例
zh-Hans.abstract: 针对高职课程《机械设计基础》教学中存在的学生参与度不高、学习兴趣不足、教学内容抽象等问题，构建了“BOPPPS + 学习通”混合式教学模式。该模式将BOPPPS教学模型的六个环节（Bridge-in, Objective, Pre-assessment, Participatory learning, Post-assessment, Summary）与学习通平台功能深度融合，贯穿课前、课中、课后三个阶段，实现线上线下教学的有机衔接。以“铰链四杆机构的组成与分类”为例，详细阐述了基于该模式的教学设计过程与实施过程。教学实践表明，“BOPPPS + 学习通”混合式教学模式能够有效激发学生的学习兴趣，提高课堂参与度，促进学生对抽象知识的理解与掌握，提升教学质量。本研究为高职院校工程类课程教学改革提供了可借鉴的实践路径。

infographic.key_insight: “BOPPPS + 学习通”混合式教学模式能够使抽象的机械设计内容对高职学生更具吸引力且更易理解。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究展示了一种通过线上线下融合提升基础机械工程教育学习成效的实用课程设计框架。
method: 将BOPPPS各阶段与学习通平台功能结合，贯穿课前、课中、课后三个阶段。
采用导入、目标、前测、参与式学习、后测和总结来组织教学。
以“铰链四杆机构的组成与分类”为案例课应用该模式。
infographic.evidence_signal: 教学实践报告显示，学生兴趣提高、课堂参与更积极、对抽象知识的理解更深入，表明教学质量得到提升。
infographic.watch_item: 摘要未提供定量对比数据，因此该有效性结论看起来基于实践观察，而非详细的测量指标。

title: Effect of Barrel Filling Ratio on the Microstructure, Phase Composition and Tribological Performance of Detonation-Sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr Coatings
authors: Zhuldyz Sagdoldina, Aiym Nabioldina, Daryn Baizhan, Nurbol Berdimuratov, Gulsym Bektasova
abstract: This study investigates the influence of barrel filling ratio on the microstructure, phase composition, and tribological performance of detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings. Coatings were deposited at barrel filling ratios of 43% and 53% under identical spraying conditions. Microstructural characterization revealed the formation of dense lamellar coatings with low porosity and uniform distribution of Cr3C2 carbide particles within the NiCr metallic matrix. Compared with the coating deposited at a barrel filling ratio of 43%, the coating deposited at 53% exhibited a denser microstructure. X-ray diffraction analysis confirmed that Cr3C2 and NiCr remained the dominant phases after spraying, while a minor amount of Cr7C3 formed due to partial decarburization of chromium carbide during thermal exposure. Tribological performance was evaluated under dry sliding conditions using a ball-on-disc configuration at normal loads of 10 and 15 N and sliding speeds of 5 and 10 cm/s. Wear volume was determined from the geometry of the wear track after testing, and wear rate was calculated accordingly. The coating produced at a barrel filling ratio of 53% demonstrated improved wear resistance under elevated loads despite exhibiting a higher coefficient of friction. The minimum wear rate reached 1.23 × 10−4 mm3/(m·N), which was associated with reduced porosity and enhanced structural integrity of the coating. The obtained results demonstrate that optimization of detonation spraying parameters significantly affects coating structure and tribological behavior. The developed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings are promising protective materials for components operating under severe friction and wear conditions, including industrial and high-temperature engineering applications.

infographic.key_insight: Raising the barrel filling ratio from 43% to 53% produced a denser Cr3C2–NiCr coating and improved wear resistance, even though friction increased.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Optimizing detonation-spraying fill ratio is a practical lever for improving the durability of carbide-based protective coatings in severe wear applications.
method: Detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings were deposited at two barrel filling ratios: 43% and 53%.
Microstructure and phases were analyzed by microscopy and X-ray diffraction.
Dry ball-on-disc tribological tests were run at 10 and 15 N with 5 and 10 cm/s sliding speeds.
infographic.evidence_signal: The 53% fill coating showed the lowest reported wear rate, 1.23 × 10^-4 mm3/(m·N), alongside reduced porosity and better structural integrity.
infographic.watch_item: The improved wear resistance came with a higher coefficient of friction, so system-level performance tradeoffs should be checked before implementation.
infographic.paper_title: Effect of Barrel Filling Ratio on the Microstructure, Phase Composition and Tribological Performance of Detonation-Sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr Coatings

zh-Hans.title: 爆炸喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层的微观组织、相组成及摩擦学性能受料筒填充率的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究考察了料筒填充率对爆炸喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层微观组织、相组成和摩擦学性能的影响。在相同喷涂条件下，分别在43%和53%的料筒填充率下制备涂层。微观组织表征显示，涂层形成了致密的层片状结构，孔隙率低，Cr3C2碳化物颗粒在NiCr金属基体中分布均匀。与43%料筒填充率下制备的涂层相比，53%料筒填充率下制备的涂层具有更致密的微观组织。X射线衍射分析证实，喷涂后Cr3C2和NiCr仍为主导相，而由于热暴露过程中铬碳化物发生部分脱碳，形成了少量Cr7C3。采用球-盘接触形式，在10和15 N法向载荷以及5和10 cm/s滑动速度下，于干摩擦条件下评估摩擦学性能。磨损体积根据试验后磨痕几何形貌确定，并据此计算磨损率。53%料筒填充率制备的涂层在较高载荷下表现出更优的耐磨性，尽管其摩擦系数更高。最小磨损率达到1.23 × 10−4 mm3/(m·N)，这与涂层孔隙率降低和结构完整性增强有关。结果表明，爆炸喷涂参数的优化会显著影响涂层结构和摩擦学行为。所制备的Cr3C2–NiCr涂层有望作为在严苛摩擦和磨损条件下工作的部件的防护材料，包括工业和高温工程应用。

infographic.key_insight: 将料筒填充率从43%提高到53%可获得更致密的Cr3C2–NiCr涂层并改善耐磨性，尽管摩擦增大。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 优化爆炸喷涂填充率是提升碳化物基防护涂层在严重磨损应用中耐久性的一个实用手段。
method: 在43%和53%两种料筒填充率下制备爆炸喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层。
通过显微观察和X射线衍射分析微观组织与相组成。
在10和15 N载荷、5和10 cm/s滑动速度下进行干态球-盘摩擦学试验。
infographic.evidence_signal: 53%填充率涂层表现出最低的报告磨损率1.23 × 10^-4 mm3/(m·N)，同时孔隙率更低、结构完整性更好。
infographic.watch_item: 更高的耐磨性伴随着更高的摩擦系数，因此在实施前应评估系统层面的性能权衡。

title: High-temperature oxidation kinetics and microstructural evolution of detonation-sprayed AlCuFe quasicrystalline coatings
authors: Xinran Li, Yi-Xiang Wang, Maxingwang Lu, Yongchao Fang
abstract: To solve the susceptibility of TC4 titanium alloys to high-temperature oxidation and subsequent performance degradation, AlCuFe quasicrystalline (QC) coatings were successfully fabricated via detonation spraying (DS) as a functional protective barrier. The oxidation kinetics, phase evolution, and mechanical stability of the coating system were systematically investigated at 450°C in an atmospheric environment for up to 250 h. The results indicate that the oxidation kinetics strictly obey the parabolic growth law, yielding a steady-state parabolic rate constant ( k p ) of 1.83 × 10 −2 mg 2 ⋅ cm −4 ⋅ h −1 . Throughout the service period, the coating exhibits a significant “thermal hardening” effect, with the surface microhardness increasing from an initial 491 HV 0.2 to a final value of 665.2 HV 0.2 (a 35.5% increment). Phase evolution is characterized by an initial thermally induced ordering of metastable regions (0–3 h) followed by the gradual decomposition of the icosahedral (I) phase into approximant phases (β, τ, and λ) driven by the Al-depletion effect. Notably, the increased density of phase boundaries and intermetallic interfaces within the multi-phase network effectively sustains the mechanical performance despite the decline in the primary QC fraction. This study demonstrates that DS-AlCuFe coatings provide a reliable structural evolution pathway for the long-term high-temperature protection of titanium alloys.

infographic.key_insight: Detonation-sprayed AlCuFe quasicrystalline coatings form a thermally stabilized multiphase structure that resists oxidation at 450�b0C while hardening over time.
infographic.engineering_relevance: These coatings offer a protective barrier for TC4 titanium alloys in high-temperature service, improving oxidation resistance and retaining mechanical integrity during long-term exposure.
method: Fabricated AlCuFe QC coatings by detonation spraying (DS)
Aged the coatings in air at 450�b0C for up to 250 h
Tracked oxidation kinetics, phase evolution, and microhardness
infographic.evidence_signal: The coating followed parabolic oxidation kinetics with kp = 1.83 �d7 10^-2 mg^2�b7cm^-4�b7h^-1, while microhardness increased from 491 HV0.2 to 665.2 HV0.2 after 250 h.
infographic.watch_item: Performance depends on maintaining the multiphase QC-derived microstructure; excessive Al depletion or service conditions beyond the tested 450�b0C/250 h window may alter oxidation and hardness behavior.
infographic.paper_title: High-temperature oxidation kinetics and microstructural evolution of detonation-sprayed AlCuFe quasicrystalline coatings

zh-Hans.title: 爆炸喷涂 AlCuFe 准晶涂层的高温氧化动力学与微观结构演化
zh-Hans.abstract: 为解决 TC4 钛合金对高温氧化及其后续性能退化的敏感性，采用爆炸喷涂（DS）成功制备了 AlCuFe 准晶（QC）涂层，作为一种功能性防护屏障。系统研究了该涂层体系在 450°C、空气环境下长达 250 h 的氧化动力学、相演化和机械稳定性。结果表明，氧化动力学严格遵循抛物线生长定律，稳态抛物线速率常数（k_p）为 1.83 × 10−2 mg2⋅cm−4⋅h−1。在整个服役期间，该涂层表现出显著的“热硬化”效应，表面显微硬度由初始的 491 HV0.2 提高到最终的 665.2 HV0.2（增加 35.5%）。相演化特征表现为：首先是 0–3 h 内亚稳态区域在热作用下发生有序化，随后在 Al 贫化效应驱动下，二十面体（I）相逐渐分解为近似相（β、τ 和 λ）。值得注意的是，多相网络中相界密度和金属间化合物界面的增加，即使在主导 QC 相分数下降的情况下，仍能有效维持机械性能。本研究表明，DS-AlCuFe 涂层为钛合金长期高温防护提供了一条可靠的结构演化路径。

infographic.key_insight: 爆炸喷涂 AlCuFe 准晶涂层形成了热稳定的多相结构，能够在 450°C 下抵抗氧化并随时间硬化。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这类涂层可作为 TC4 钛合金高温服役中的防护屏障，提高抗氧化性，并在长期暴露过程中保持机械完整性。
method: 采用爆炸喷涂（DS）制备 AlCuFe QC 涂层
在 450°C 空气中对涂层进行最长 250 h 的时效处理
跟踪氧化动力学、相演化和显微硬度
infographic.evidence_signal: 该涂层遵循抛物线氧化动力学，kp = 1.83 × 10^-2 mg^2·cm^-4·h^-1；同时，在 250 h 后，显微硬度从 491 HV0.2 增至 665.2 HV0.2。
infographic.watch_item: 性能取决于维持多相 QC 衍生微观结构；若 Al 发生过度贫化，或服役条件超出所测试的 450°C/250 h 范围，氧化和硬度行为可能发生改变。

title: Optimising Cold Spray Additive Manufacturing: Pressure-driven enhancement of mechanical performance in copper deposits
authors: Steven Camilleri, Thi Thuy Tien Tran, Keita Nomoto, Andrew Duguid, Matthew Harbidge, Riyan Rashid
abstract: Cold spray additive manufacturing (CSAM) is a solid-state process capable of producing dense metallic components without melting, making it highly attractive for copper applications requiring both electrical conductivity and mechanical integrity. In this study, the influence of spray pressure at 30 bar, 40 bar, 50 bar and 60 bar on particle velocity, microstructure, and properties of cold-sprayed copper was systematically investigated using a LightSPEE3D system. The cold spray deposits were characterised by X-ray diffraction (XRD), hardness testing, eddy current conductivity, tensile evaluation, and scanning electron microscopy (SEM). The results reveal that increasing spray pressure enhances particle velocities beyond the critical threshold for copper, leading to improved inter-particle bonding and microstructural refinement consistent with severe plastic deformation and possible continuous dynamic recrystallisation (cDRX)-assisted mechanisms. XRD analysis suggested progressive crystallite refinement and increased dislocation density with pressure, which directly correlated with improved ductility. While hardness decreased due to recovery and recrystallisation, electrical conductivity increased, likely due to improved inter-particle continuity and reduced interfacial discontinuities. Tensile testing showed a clear strength-ductility transition, with deposits at higher pressures exhibiting substantially improved ductility approaching bulk copper behaviour and fully ductile fracture morphologies. Overall, the findings identify an optimum processing window at higher spray pressures, where copper cold spray deposits achieve a balanced combination of conductivity, ductility, and strength. This study highlights the critical role of spray pressure in controlling the interplay between particle velocity, dynamic recrystallisation, and multifunctional performance in CSAM copper components. This study establishes a process-structure-property relationship linking particle velocity, XRD-derived microstructural evolution, conductivity, and tensile behaviour within a LightSPEE3D CSAM system.

infographic.key_insight: Raising cold-spray pressure from 30 to 60 bar increases copper particle velocity past the bonding threshold, driving a stronger, more ductile, and better-conducting deposit.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This identifies spray pressure as a primary control knob for tuning the process–structure–property balance in copper CSAM parts where both electrical conductivity and mechanical integrity matter.
method: Cold-sprayed copper on a LightSPEE3D system at 30, 40, 50, and 60 bar.
Measured particle velocity, XRD crystallite/dislocation changes, hardness, conductivity, tensile behavior, and SEM fracture/microstructure.
Compared property trends to infer pressure-driven bonding and recrystallisation mechanisms.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports pressure-dependent improvements in conductivity and ductility, with XRD indicating crystallite refinement/dislocation changes and tensile tests showing a transition toward fully ductile fracture at higher pressures.
infographic.watch_item: Higher pressure may improve bonding but also promotes recovery/recrystallisation and hardness loss, so the best operating window must balance strength, ductility, and conductivity for the target application.
infographic.paper_title: Optimising Cold Spray Additive Manufacturing: Pressure-driven enhancement of mechanical performance in copper deposits

zh-Hans.title: 冷喷涂增材制造优化：压力驱动提升铜沉积层机械性能
zh-Hans.abstract: 冷喷涂增材制造（CSAM）是一种固态工艺，能够在不熔化的情况下制备致密金属部件，因此对于同时要求导电性和机械完整性的铜应用具有很强吸引力。本研究采用 LightSPEE3D 系统，系统考察了喷涂压力在 30 bar、40 bar、50 bar 和 60 bar 条件下对冷喷涂铜颗粒速度、微观组织及性能的影响。通过 X 射线衍射（XRD）、硬度测试、涡流电导率测试、拉伸评价和扫描电子显微镜（SEM）对冷喷涂沉积层进行了表征。结果表明，提高喷涂压力可使颗粒速度超过铜的临界阈值，从而增强颗粒间结合，并促进与严重塑性变形及可能由连续动态再结晶（cDRX）辅助的机制相一致的微观组织细化。XRD 分析表明，随着压力升高，晶粒细化和位错密度增加，这与延展性的改善直接相关。虽然由于回复和再结晶导致硬度降低，但电导率提高，这可能是由于颗粒间连续性改善以及界面不连续性减少所致。拉伸测试显示出明显的强度—延性转变，高压条件下制备的沉积层表现出显著提升的延展性，接近块体铜的行为，并呈现完全韧性断裂形貌。总体而言，研究结果确定了更高喷涂压力下的最佳工艺窗口，在该窗口内，冷喷涂铜沉积层能够实现导电性、延展性和强度的平衡组合。本研究强调了喷涂压力在调控 CSAM 铜部件中颗粒速度、动态再结晶与多功能性能相互作用方面的关键作用。本研究建立了 LightSPEE3D CSAM 系统中颗粒速度、基于 XRD 的微观组织演化、电导率与拉伸行为之间的工艺—组织—性能关系。

infographic.key_insight: 将冷喷涂压力从 30 提高到 60 bar 会使铜颗粒速度超过结合阈值，从而形成更强、更具延展性且导电性更好的沉积层。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这表明喷涂压力是调控铜 CSAM 零件工艺—组织—性能平衡的主要控制参数，尤其适用于同时需要电导率和机械完整性的场合。
method: 在 LightSPEE3D 系统上，于 30、40、50 和 60 bar 条件下冷喷涂铜。
测量颗粒速度、XRD 晶粒/位错变化、硬度、电导率、拉伸行为以及 SEM 断口/微观组织。
比较性能趋势，以推断压力驱动的结合与再结晶机制。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报道了随压力变化而提升的电导率和延展性，XRD 显示晶粒细化/位错变化，而拉伸测试显示在较高压力下断裂形貌向完全韧性断裂转变。
infographic.watch_item: 更高压力可能改善结合，但也会促进回复/再结晶并导致硬度下降，因此最佳工艺窗口必须针对目标应用在强度、延展性和电导率之间取得平衡。
